title: Why PEANUT BUTTER is one of the worst foods with Dave Asprey

chunks.title: Introduction and Podcast Overview
chunks.summary: The host introduces the podcast episode, mentions his background as a raw vegan, and expresses his gratitude for having guest Dave Asprey. They discuss various topics, including highlights from Dave's new book, the issues with certain plant-based foods, and share encouraging insights about fructose and nutrition.
chunks.transcript: and I say this as a raw vegan who Juiced more kale and spinach than most people and I got oxalate toxicity from doing this uh it is not good in this week's podcast I'm grateful to have my friend Dave aspreon he recently wrote a new book called smarter not harder we talk about some of the highlights in that book and we get into all kinds of good stuff in this podcast we talk about plant defense chemicals phytic acid oxalates why peanut butter is horrible for you we talk about seed oils even more we get Dave's opinion on seed oils we have some healthy disagreements about coffee and we talk about fructose we definitely drill down into the fructose Rabbit Hole a little bit talk about Dave's perspective on eating fruit and honey and my perspective in my labs and Dave's labs and all kinds of good stuff so I think you guys are really going to enjoy this one we got into a lot of valuable points and yeah enjoy it I think Dave's done a lot of good work in the biohacking space and offers a lot of value in his new book so enjoy this podcast with Dave asprey next week will be Georgie dinkov and we'll talk more about fructose from the rapey perspective so stay tuned for that as

chunks.title: Plant Compounds and Health
chunks.summary: Dave explains the issues related to lectins, phytic acid, and oxalates found in plant foods. They discuss how different people react to various plant toxins and share advice on how to get rid of inflammatory foods to determine their impact on health.
